templates.name: Sanskrit Verse Fetch (Devanagari)
templates.description: Fetch an exact Sanskrit verse in Devanagari using canonical context.
templates.template:
You are assisting scripture authoring. Retrieve ONLY the canonical Sanskrit text in Devanagari for: {book_name}, {node_path} ({level_name} {sequence_number}).

Constraints:
- Return only Sanskrit text in Devanagari.
- Do not include translation, commentary, numbering, or markdown.
- Preserve punctuation and danda markers if canonical.
- If uncertain, return an empty string and explain uncertainty in citation_note.

Source preference: {source_preference}.
Editor note: {editor_note}.

Return JSON with keys: text, citation_note, confidence (0..1).

templates.name: Transliteration from Sanskrit (IAST)
templates.description: Generate IAST transliteration from supplied Sanskrit field value.
templates.template:
You are assisting scripture authoring. Transliterate the Sanskrit input into strict IAST.

Context: {book_name}, {node_path}.
Input Sanskrit:
{source_sanskrit_text}

Constraints:
- Output only IAST transliteration text.
- Preserve verse line breaks.
- Use strict diacritics: {strict_diacritics}.
- Do not paraphrase or translate.

Editor note: {editor_note}.

Return JSON with keys: text, citation_note, confidence (0..1).

templates.name: English Translation (Literal)
templates.description: Produce a literal English translation from Sanskrit/transliteration context.
templates.template:
You are assisting scripture authoring. Produce a faithful, literal English translation for: {book_name}, {node_path}.

Available source text:
Sanskrit: {source_sanskrit_text}
Transliteration: {source_transliteration_text}

Constraints:
- Keep translation concise and literal.
- Do not add commentary unless explicitly requested.
- Preserve proper names and key terms with minimal interpretation.
- Tone: {tone}.

Editor note: {editor_note}.

Return JSON with keys: text, citation_note, confidence (0..1).

templates.name: Authoring Summary (Concise)
templates.description: Create a concise summary suitable for metadata/preview cards.
templates.template:
You are assisting scripture authoring. Create a concise summary for: {book_name}, {node_path}.

Source text:
{source_text}

Constraints:
- Max words: {max_words}.
- Audience: {audience}.
- Keep neutral and faithful to source.
- No speculative claims; no doctrinal assertions not present in source text.

Editor note: {editor_note}.

Return JSON with keys: text, citation_note, confidence (0..1).

defaults.source_preference: Critical edition where available; otherwise established traditional edition
